title: trisetobromus hirtus
intro: Trisetobromus hirtus is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is also known as Bromus hirtus, and is primarily found in temperate regions of Europe, Asia, and Africa. While I can't find much information on its medicinal properties, Trisetobromus hirtus is known to be used in traditional herbal preparations, possibly due to its high silica content, which may provide some health benefits. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential uses.
